top_findings.title: Tests re-declare all handlers instead of exercising app.go — production routes have ~3% coverage
top_findings.evidence: app_test.go:16-178 setupTestRouter() rebuilds every route inline; app.go main()/initDB() and the registered handlers are never invoked by any test, so scores.json test_coverage=0.03 despite 10 passing tests (defect_rate=1.0)
top_findings.suggestion: Extract route registration into a testable func (e.g. newRouter(db) *gin.Engine) in app.go and have the tests call it, so the shipped handlers are what gets exercised
